policies.productName: China Life Lifetime Income Supreme Plan
policies.description:
China Life Lifetime Income Supreme Plan is a single premium payment, participating whole life plan that is designed to serve one’s income and wealth accumulation needs by providing lifetime guaranteed yearly income and non-guaranteed yearly income starting from the end of the 5th policy year.

For multi-generational income needs, the plan allows the appointment of Contingent Life Insured(s) to ensure continuity of the policy benefits. Besides yearly income, the plan also provides financial prote
